# rapid7 Provider

The Rapid7 provider is used to manage Rapid7 SIEM resources via Terraform. The provider must be configured with API credentials before use.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) An [Insight Platform API key](https://docs.rapid7.com/insight/managing-platform-api-keys) with sufficient permissions to access the configured organization. May also be configured by providing the `TF_RAPID7_API_KEY` environment variable
- `organization_id` (String) Identifier of the organization the provider will be used to manage the resources of. May also be configured by providing the `TF_RAPID7_ORGANIZATION_ID` environment variable
- `region` (String) Data storage region where the configured organization is located - one of: `us` `us2` `us3` `eu` `ap` `aps2` `ca` `au` `me1` . May also be configured by providing the `TF_RAPID7_REGION` environment variable
